name: Cascade Twitter - User Relationship
description: Check follow relationship between two Twitter/X users. Returns whether source follows target and vice versa.

name: Cascade Twitter - Batch Users
description: Batch fetch multiple Twitter/X user profiles by username or ID. Returns display name, bio, follower/following counts, verification status, and profile metadata.

name: Cascade Twitter - Batch Tweets
description: Batch fetch multiple tweets by ID in a single request. Returns full tweet objects with text, author, metrics, media, and engagement data.

name: Cascade Twitter - Community Search
description: Search Twitter/X community tweets by keyword. Returns tweets from community discussions with author info, metrics, and media.

name: Cascade Twitter - Trends
description: Current trending topics on Twitter/X. Returns trend name, tweet volume, and category. No parameters required.

name: Cascade Twitter - User Search
description: Search Twitter/X user profiles by keyword. Returns username, display name, bio, follower/following counts, verification status. Supports pagination.

name: Cascade Twitter - Tweet Search
description: Search Twitter/X tweets with advanced query operators (from:, to:, has:, lang:, etc). Returns tweet text, author, metrics, media. Supports sort by Latest/Top, pagination up to 200 results per request.

name: Cascade Web API
description: Web crawling and search API. Crawl any URL to markdown/HTML/text with CSS selectors and proxy support. Web search powered by Exa. Bulk crawl up to 10 URLs per request. $0.005/crawl, $0.01/search. Dual-network x402 (Solana + Base USDC).

name: Cascade Inference
description: OpenAI-compatible chat completions gateway with 7 models: Kimi K2.5, MiniMax M2.5, Qwen 2.5 7B, Claude Sonnet 4.5/4.6, Claude Opus 4.5/4.6. Dynamic input-aware pricing from $0.001/req for cheap models to $0.40/req for Opus with large prompts. Supports streaming, max_tokens control. Dual-network x402 (Solana + Base USDC).
